programme.title: Caring Bean
programme.desc: When Mrs. Wicket is disabled by Mr. Bean's toy car, he takes care of her.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E24 The Sweetville Parade - As Chelsea and her friends decorate their bikes, they wonder if they could have their own parade, leading Chelsea to Sweetville where she inspires the whole town to come up with ideas to make the best parade ever.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E25 The Fancy Cheese Fiasco - When Chelsea and Otto accidentally break something of Barbie's, they are afraid to tell her. In Sweetville, they break a statue and try to conceal it from Barbie before a ceremony, before learning that it's best to be honest and confess to the mistake.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E26 The Tumblin' Tangleweed - Chelsea imagines herself in Wispy Forest, where everyone seems to have lost items that they did not return it to their proper place. A giant tumbling ‘tangleweed' of Wispy Forest is formed, and rolls through, picking up the stray items.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E5 The Sweetest Journey - While on a nature hike with Barbie, Chelsea runs ahead as Barbie takes her own sweet time. Meanwhile in Dreamtopia, Princess Berry Swirl Barbie prepares the castle for the Sweet Pair Party, but Peanut Butter can't find Jelly, so Chelsea help him find his partner in time for the big event.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E6 A Mopple Mishap - Like the game of telephone, Chelsea and her friends see just how easy it is for misunderstandings to occur. In Dreamtopia, a misunderstanding sends the Mopplekin into a panic.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E7 A Staticky Situation - A rainstorm keeps Chelsea from going outside, but that doesn't stop her from thinking about Dreamtopia! She arrives in the magical world to find an outbreak of static electricity that is causing everyone's hair to stick together and threatening to ruin their Disco Dance Party.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E8 The Lost Treasure of the Prism Princess - When sprinklers unexpectedly interrupt their soccer game, Chelsea and her friends must take cover in a small playhouse.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E9 Four Times the Chelsea - While Chelsea works with Otto on a puzzle, his know-it-all attitude has her wishing for a friend who is just like her. In Dreamtopia, Apprentice Queen Barbie grants that wish but accidentally creates three Chelsea clones.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E10 The Wispy Forest Hairathalon - At home, Chelsea is struggling to do a cartwheel but refuses Barbie's offer of help. Chelsea's imagination takes her to Dreamtopia where she finds herself participating in the Hairathalon.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E11 A Winning Color Combination - When they each open up a lemonade stand, Chelsea's lemonade is too sweet and Otto's too sour. In Dreamtopia, the color green is fading. Chelsea and the Rainbow Queen Barbie must convince a bickering Yellow and Blue Junior Rainbow Princesses to restore green and harmony to Rainbow Cove.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E12 The Damaged Spellbook - When Chelsea discovers that Otto has torn a page in a cookbook that he borrowed, she goes to Dreamtopia, where the Apprentice Queens perform an opposite spell that mysteriously goes haywire because Notto Prince covered up the fact that he tore a page from their spell book.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Justin and the Knights of Valour
programme.desc: Set in a magical world that children still dream of, JUSTIN AND THE KNIGHTS OF VALOUR is about the determination of a boy to fulfil his dream. A heart-warming story about friendship, honour and courage, filled with adventure, action and fun.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: To save his family, Mosley, must embark on an epic journey to find the legendary Uprights... but what he unexpectedly finds will unlock a secret revealing his true nature. With large and layered themes, Mosley tells a timeless adventurous tale of family, love and hope!

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Wrong
programme.desc: Dolph Springer wakes up one morning to realize he has lost the love of his life, his dog, Paul. During his quest to get Paul (and his life) back, Dolph radically changes the lives of others. In his journey to find Paul, Dolph may lose something even more vital – his mind.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Stonados
programme.desc: When a sinister weather system develops and starts to throw off exploding bowling - ball sized stones, a former storm chaser decides to take drastic action. Stars Paul Johansson (2013).

programme.title: End Of The World
programme.desc: When Earth is threatened by solar flares, humanity must turn to an unlikely group to save the planet. Stars Greg Grunberg (2013)

programme.title: Miami Magma
programme.desc: A volcano expert and her sister have to try and shut-down an illegal oil drilling operation.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet. Her new confidence empowers her to live fearlessly, but what happens when she realizes her appearance never changed?

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: Rex
programme.desc: Rex is based on the true-life story of young Marine Corporal Megan Leavey whose unique discipline and bond with her military combat dog saved many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Princess Caraboo
programme.desc: A mysterious young woman speaking a strange language shows up in an English village, where she is taken in by aristocrats who assume she is a foreign princess

programme.title: Waking Ned
programme.desc: When word reaches two elderly best friends that someone in their tiny Irish village has won the national lottery, they go to great lengths to find the winner so they can share the wealth. When they discover the "lucky" winner, Ned Devine, they find he has died of shock upon discovering his win before collecting it. Not wanting the money to go to waste, the villagers enter into a pact to pretend Ned is still alive by having another man pose as him, and then to divide the money between them.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Prince Valiant
programme.desc: In a time now lost in the mists of memory, the great King Arthur rules in the legendary citadel that is Camelot. Starring: Stephen Moyer, Katherine Heigl, Thomas Kretschmann

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss and Peeta become targets of the Capitol after their victory in the Hunger Games sparks a rebellion.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss is rescued by rebels and brought to District 13 where she becomes The Mockingjay.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss and a team of rebels from District 13 prepare for the final battle that will decide the fate of Panem.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to France to collect the remains of his adult son who was killed in the Pyrenees in a storm while walking The Camino de Santiago - also known as 'The Way of Saint James'. Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage, leaving his California life behind. Armed only with his son's backpack and guidebook, he begins the 800km historical pilgrimage but soon discovers that he won't be alone on this journey - he meets other pilgrims from around the world, all broken and looking for greater meaning in their lives. From the hardship experienced along "The Way" an unlikely group of misfits are bonded and Tom begins to learn the difference between 'The life we live and the life we choose.'

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Robin Hood: The Rebellion
programme.desc: The Raid meets Die Hard with a medieval twist, in this fast and furious new take on the legend of Robin Hood featuring the stars of Game of Thrones, Vikings and Torchwood. When Maid Marian is kidnapped by the Sheriff of Nottingham, Robin Hood must get a band of men together to save her. An audacious plan is set to penetrate the depths of the Sheriff's castle to defeat the bloodthirsty tyrant.

programme.title: Crash and Burn
programme.desc: The iconic true story of legendary Tommy Byrne- the worlds greatest racing car driver equivalent of George Best and Muhammad Ali rolled into one. The only thing standing in the way of fame and fortune was Tommys own hedonistic lifestyle sex, drugs and fast cars. Experience the remarkable life of the only racing driver Senna ever feared. His rise was meteoric and his fall spectacular

programme.title: Curvature
programme.desc: A grieving engineer, haunted by her husbands suicide, wakes up 36 hours in the past. As she races against time to prevent a terrible future, she must confront a dark secret from her own past.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A Quiet Place meets Species. Mena Suvari faces aquatic horrors in this tense, original and sexy sci-fi thriller. When Libby returns from summer camp she is introduced to her Mum's chiseled fianc, John. When John ignites an inappropriate curiosity in Libby her suspicions are escalated when she sees a piercing, amber light from the lake outside, and witnesses John submerge and disappear.

programme.title: A Love Yarn
programme.desc: Samuel heads to New Zealand to help sell his aunt's mill. Yarn shop owner Sophie has a plan that will save the mill, but can she convince Samuel? She soon discovers it's harder than it seems. (2020)

programme.title: In The Key Of Love
programme.desc: Music producer Jake returns home for his sister's wedding. Maggie, his ex, is the Wedding photographer. Will the romantic setting help reignite the flames?

programme.title: Wedding at The Hamptons
programme.desc: An aspiring fashion designer gets her chance to debut at a lavish Manhattan wedding where she is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: Loving Every Minute
programme.desc: (2022) Fantastical romance with Jess Brown. Stephanie inherits a watch that allows her to travel back in time by five minutes, once a day. Will the tricky timepiece help or hinder her in romance?

programme.title: The Longest Week
programme.desc: A man is left broke and homeless, so an old friend offers him somewhere to stay- only for him to fall in love with his girlfriend. Starring Jason Bateman and Olivia Wilde (2014)

programme.title: Finding Love in Mountain View
programme.desc: After learning she's been entrusted to take care of her deceased cousin's children, an architect is torn between focusing on her career and honouring her cousin's wish.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: The Romantics
programme.desc: Oscar winner Anna Paquin and Katie Holmes prove nothing complicates love like friendship in this zeitgeist love story.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: Known as a “fixer” for difficult clients, a talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to dazzle the mayor and save his company. Wil the "fixer" fix something more than just the company?

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: A Candlelit Christmas
programme.desc: Ellie, a perfume maker, travels back home for Christmas and help her dad with the business. Little does she know, that Logan is staying with him. As Ellie's attempts to learn about her family, Logan helps her realize that fairy tales do indeed exist!

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: OLIVIA is picked to run the Christmas recital of The Nutcracker. When a video of Michael practising ballet with Lily goes viral, Olivia sees how much dance really means to the community. Will Olivia be able to save her dance studio with Michael's help?

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: It's a Fixer Upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers find they're in financial jeopardy, the only answer is to sell the house Anne's parent's left her. But when no one wants to buy it, they decide the only way to get rid of the house is to fix it up.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: Letters From the Heart
programme.desc: Hope's Nona passes away, and upon Hopes return to Cherry Valley for the funeral, she learns she is to inherit a large sum of money, with one condition.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: Accused at 17
programme.desc: Bianca's prank on Dory, her boyfriend's fling, leads to a murder accusation.

programme.title: Pregnant at 17
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal crime, Chelsea, 17, falls for older man Jeff.

programme.title: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher's perfect life is disrupted by a sex scandal.

programme.title: Forever 16
programme.desc: 16-year-old vampire Raven becomes an undercover cop at Winter Academy.

programme.title: Accused at 17
programme.desc: Bianca's prank on Dory, her boyfriend's fling, leads to a murder accusation.

programme.title: Ice Girls
programme.desc: A figure skater is injured during a competition. A coach that hired her then helps her rehab her injury so that she may live her dream.

programme.title: Flowers & Honey
programme.desc: Florist Sarah inherits a ranch and must decide whether to sell it, or live the life of her dreams.

programme.title: Killer in Suburbia
programme.desc: Gina and her daughter move to a new town, but when she is abducted, Gina must save her and trust no one.

programme.title: A Holiday Homecoming
programme.desc: The residents of Hope, NY come to the aid of displaced foster children caught in fire right before Christmas.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Roxanne
programme.desc: Inspired by Cyrano de Bergerac, the comic story of a man with the heart of a great lover, the soul of a poet, and the nose for trouble.

programme.title: The Animal (2001)
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) meets the girl of his dreams (Brooklyn Decker) but has to enlist his loyal assistant Katherine (Jennifer Aniston) to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie. When more lies backfire, Katherine's kids become involved, and everyone heads off to Hawaii for a ridiculous, out-of-control weekend that tests the limits of how far we'll go for love.

programme.title: Ride the Man Down
programme.desc: Disputes over a dead man's property escalate into a bloody range war.

programme.title: Heroes of Fort Worth
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a group of confederate soldiers with the help of Apache Indians, try to defeat a Union fort, while trying to gain support from Emperor Maximillian of Mexico.

programme.title: Pancho Villa
programme.desc: A double-cross in an arms deal prompts Mexican revolutionary Pancho Villa to raid a US Army weapons depot in Columbus, New Mexico.

programme.title: The Avenging Angel
programme.desc: Miles Utley, a skilled Mormon commando and bodyguard, is forced to go rogue while investigating a deadly scandal of assassination and land speculation. As danger mounts, he must confront his beliefs and decide where his true loyalties lie in a world of betrayal and faith.

programme.title: Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The day before he is due to retire an old engine-driver reports his stoker for drunkenness. The man is discharged and threatens to make trouble. As the train is leaving on the driver's last run the stoker boards it, followed by the driver's daughter. During the run the old man discovers what he believes to be an illicit love between his daughter and the new stoker, whom he knocks off the cab. He is himself struck down by his former mate, but the girl is also there, and she is faced with the awesome task of bringing the great train safely to a standstill.

programme.title: Secret People
programme.desc: Two girls come from abroad to a small Paddington cafe in the London of 1930, run by Anselmo, an ebullient South European. They are sisters - Maria and Nora - aged 19 and 10. They have been entrusted to Anselmo by their father, an outspoken writer threatened by his own country's police. He has sacrificed himself to save his daughters, while Louis, the young man Maria loves, has stayed behind to continue the struggle.

programme.title: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Benson Gray, senior surgeon at Graftondale Hospital, wins another round in his battle with research-minded junior surgeon, Neil Isherwood, when he appoints newly-qualified Philip Selwood as registrar.

programme.title: Family Way
programme.desc: Arthur Fitton and Jenny Piper's wedding is a typical North of England working class affair. But they are both unusually sensitive and find the well-meant but vulgar ribaldry of their relatives and neighbors a terrible obstacle to their efforts to consummate their marriage.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends make a remarkable discovery in a rural field - a crashed spacecraft - And there's a survivor. But when they bring the otherworldly being home, they soon discover that it holds even greater secrets than they could imagine.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mystery: More Bitter Than Death
programme.desc: (2019) Murder mystery with Courtney Thorne-Smith. Emma investigates when the president of an archaeological organisation is poisoned - unearthing more than she bargained for!

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective: Death Al Dente
programme.desc: A culinary expert finds himself at the heart of another murder mystery when he is hired to find the best Italian chef for a new high-end eatery. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2016)

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed For Murder
programme.desc: After the body of her friend's father is found in a mansion she is hired to fix, Shannon Hughes must investigate a potential murder. Starring Jewel (2017)

programme.title: Murder 101: If Wishes Were Horses
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private detective work together to try and solve a disappearance.

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: Ships In The Night
programme.desc: (2020) Crime mystery with Jesse Metcalfe. When a gallery robbery leads to murder, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson and his old flame Dr Zee Madeiras catch a killer with an eye for the perfect crime?

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Get Carter
programme.desc: A Las Vegas mob enforcer travels back to his hometown to investigate his brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Chill Factor
programme.desc: A new biological chemical weapon that explodes up to temperatures over fifty degrees Fahrenheit, falls into the hands of two men who try to make sure that it doesn't get stolen by a terrorist.

programme.title: Enough
programme.desc: Working-class waitress Slim (Jennifer Lopez -The Wedding Planner) thought she was entering a life of domestic bliss when she married Mitch (Billy Campbell - TV's "Once and Again"), the man of her dreams. After the arrival of their first child, her picture perfect life is shattered when she discovers Mitch's hidden possessive dark side, a controlling and abusive alter ego that can turn trust, loveand tranquility into terror.

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past.

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: A writer is stalked at his remote lakeside cabin by a psychotic stranger seeking revenge for perceived plagiarism.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny and Mickey Lubitch learn that their son, Tod, is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world.

programme.title: Percy vs Goliath
programme.desc: Small-town farmer Percy (Christopher Walken) takes on a giant corporation after they contaminate his crops in a desperate war against corporate greed.

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: During some extensive renovations on an eight-storey office building, a major gas leak leads to a terrible explosion, trapping the injured staff in a fiery maze. Can the brave firefighters provide a safe exit from this deadly inferno?

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: They chose the worst man for the job. They expected him to fail, but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. Personal demons put Jack a New York City cop at rock bottom.

programme.title: Born to Race
programme.desc: Born To Race is the story of Danny Krueger, a rebellious young street racer on a collision course with trouble. After an accident at an illegal street race, he is sent to a small town to live with his estranged father, a washed up NASCAR racer.
